title: 信念医药简介医药新闻-ByDrug-一站式医药资源共享中心
summary:
信念医药集团公司（Belief BioMed，BBM）于2016年9月成立，是业内领先的，将基因疗法、生产平台和临床技术全面整合的创新药公司。集团总部位于上海，已在美国北卡罗莱纳州、香港、北京、上海和苏州设立了办公室或研发生产中心。公司致力于通过腺相关病毒(AAV)载体技术为单基因遗传病、老年性疾病以及一些恶性疾病提供更加有效的创新性
...
信念医药拥有自主专利的多种AAV载体，以及数十种组织嗜性极其特异的新型Capsid，其所拥有的重组AAV包装技术已被广泛应用于AAV基因治疗领域。公司具有极其丰富的研发管线，覆盖血友病A、血友病B、帕金森症、老年性黄斑病变、粘多糖贮积症、脊髓性肌萎缩症及肌萎缩侧索硬化症等多种重大、未被满足临床需求的疾病。多个管线进入临床试验阶段，已收集的临床数据显示疗效显著安全性良好；已成功开发全球领先的HEK293悬浮无血清培养工艺（200L和500L工艺均已成功投产）和全层析的规模化纯化工艺；数个产品已进入IND申报阶段。
...
2021年8月6日，信念医药全资子公司上海信致医药科技有限公司自主研发的BBM-H901注射液（适用于预防血友病B成年男性患者出

title: Half of newly developed drugs are the result of this 1983 Law - Index-Journal
summary: # Half of newly developed drugs are the result of this 1983 Law. Four decades later, they make up more than half of the new drugs the Food and Drug Administration approves. More than half of them (26 in all) were built to treat a rare disease. Back then, rare diseases were a part of the market that drug companies avoided. In the decade before 1983, fewer than 10 drugs for rare conditions reached the market. Forty-plus years later, treating the rare has become one of the most active and closely w

title: Drug discovery has a human biology problem - pharmaphorum
summary: # Drug discovery has a human biology problem. Optimising clinical success rates and reducing development expenditure requires the integration of physiological models derived directly from human biology at the outset of the discovery pipeline. Ultimately, late-stage attrition in Phase II and III clinical trials drives the rising cost of drug development and delays the availability of new therapeutic interventions for target populations. Mitigating these risks requires preclinical models that more
